entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Marcus?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Hi there, yes, this is Marcus. I'd like to schedule an appointment.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Please share your date of birth. Please share your date of birth.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Sure, it's August 22, 1990.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Thanks, Marcus. How can I help today?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I’d like to book an appointment for Tuesday, June 21st, if that’s available.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: One moment.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Sure, no problem. I'll wait.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I'm not seeing anything open that week. We can try another date or I can look for any provider. What would you prefer?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Hmm, I’m pretty sure I saw Tuesday, June 21st open. Are you sure there’s nothing on that day?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I checked again, and I'm still not seeing any openings on that date. If you want, I could look in another day or check any provider.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Okay, let’s go with the next available Tuesday, maybe June 23rd. Does that work?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I'm not seeing anything open that Tuesday either. I can check another day or try any provider if you want.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: All right, how about we check for any available slots on Tuesday that week, June 23rd, with any provider?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: We have openings on Tuesday, June 23rd with any provider. The earliest one is at 9 a.m. with Dr. Zygnew Lukowski. Another option is 10 a.m. with Dr. Kelly Noble. Would you like me to book one of those?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Let’s go with the 9 a.m. with Dr. Zygmunt Lukosky. That works for me.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Your appointment is booked for Tuesday, June 23rd at 9 a.m. Please bring your government-issued photo ID and insurance card, plus a list of current medications and any imaging discs if you have them.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Got it, I’ll make sure to bring those. Thanks for your help!

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: You're all set. If you need anything else, just call back.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Thanks a lot, I appreciate it. Have a great day!

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: You too.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Take care, bye now.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Bye.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Bye!
